001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
004import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.NotificationEnum;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.NotificationMessage;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HighestAamRequest;
012
013import java.util.Locale;
014
015/**
016 * Malfunction code to report to Tandem is getErrorString
017 */
018/**
019 * Malfunction code to report to Tandem is getErrorString
020 *
021
022 *
023 * <br>
024 *
025 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HighestAamRequest}, opCode 121, size 11
026 *
027 * <br>
028 *
029 * 
030 * <table border='1'>
031 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
032 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>121</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
033 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>11</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
034 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>variableSize</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
035 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
036 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
037 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HighestAamRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
038 * </table>
039 */@MessageProps(
040    opCode=121,
041    size=11, // or 10
042    variableSize=true,
043    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
044    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
045    request=HighestAamRequest.class
046)
047public class HighestAamResponse extends NotificationMessage implements NotificationEnum {
048
049    private long aamId;
050    private long faultId;
051    private byte[] remaining;
052
053    private String errorString;
054
055    public HighestAamResponse() {}
056
057    public HighestAamResponse(long aamId, long faultId, byte[] remaining) {
058        this.cargo = buildCargo(aamId, faultId, remaining);
059        parse(cargo);
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * <table border="1">
064     * <caption>Parsed fields for HighestAamResponse:</caption>
065     * <tr><td><code>aamId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0)</code></td></tr>
066     * <tr><td><code>faultId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 4)</code></td></tr>
067     * <tr><td><code>remaining</code></td><td><code>Bytes.dropFirstN(raw, 8)</code></td></tr>
068     * <tr><td><code>errorString</code></td><td><code>getErrorString()</code></td></tr>
069     * </table>
070     */
071    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
072        Validate.isTrue(
073            raw.length == props().size() || raw.length == props().size() - 1,
074            "Unexpected HighestAamResponse payload length: %d",
075            raw.length
076        );
077        this.cargo = raw;
078        this.aamId = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0);
079        this.faultId = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 4);
080        this.remaining = Bytes.dropFirstN(raw, 8);
081        this.errorString = getErrorString();
082    }
083
084    /**
085     * <table border="1">
086     * <caption>Byte layout for HighestAamResponse.buildCargo(...):</caption>
087     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
088     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>toUint32(aamId) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
089     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>toUint32(aamId) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
090     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>toUint32(aamId) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
091     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>toUint32(aamId) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
092     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>toUint32(faultId) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
093     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint32(faultId) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
094     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint32(faultId) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
095     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint32(faultId) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
096     * </table>
097     */
098    public static byte[] buildCargo(long aamId, long faultId, byte[] remaining) {
099        return Bytes.combine(
100            Bytes.toUint32(aamId),
101            Bytes.toUint32(faultId),
102            remaining
103        );
104    }
105
106    public long getAamId() {
107        return aamId;
108    }
109
110    public long getFaultId() {
111        return faultId;
112    }
113
114    public byte[] getRemaining() {
115        return remaining;
116    }
117
118    public String getFaultIdAsHex() {
119        return Long.toString(getFaultId(), 16);
120    }
121
122    /**
123     * Backward-compatible alias for getAamId().
124     */
125    public long getCodeA() {
126        return getAamId();
127    }
128
129    /**
130     * Backward-compatible alias for getFaultId().
131     */
132    public long getCodeB() {
133        return getFaultId();
134    }
135
136    public String getErrorString() {
137        if (!hasMalfunction()) return "";
138        return String.format(Locale.US, "%d-0x%s", getAamId(), getFaultIdAsHex());
139    }
140
141    public long[][] IGNORABLE_CODES = new long[][]{
142            {0, 0}, // empty
143            {3, 8230}, // 3-0x2026
144            {18, 8311}, // 18-0x2077 (aamId=18, faultId=8311, remaining={2,3,10}
145            {26, 8322}, // 26-0x2082 (cargo: 26,0,0,0,-126,32,0,0,1,1,0)
146    };
147
148    /**
149     * If the provided response ACTUALLY appears to be a pump malfunction,
150     * and not just a matching ID from a concurrent alert or alarm code.
151     *
152     * @param otherMessages other {@link NotificationMessage} implementations (e.g.
153     *                      {@link AlarmStatusResponse}, {@link AlertStatusResponse}) which are also
154     *                      present as concurrent notifications along with this reported malfunction
155     * @return if the malfunction code appears to be valid due to not having any other matching
156     *         concurrent notifications
157     */
158    public boolean hasMalfunction(NotificationMessage... otherMessages) {
159        for (long[] code : IGNORABLE_CODES) {
160            if (code[0] == getAamId() && code[1] == getFaultId()) {
161                return false;
162            }
163        }
164
165        if (matchesKnownIds(otherMessages)) {
166            return false;
167        }
168
169        return true;
170    }
171
172    public boolean matchesKnownIds(NotificationMessage... otherMessages) {
173        if (otherMessages == null) {
174            return false;
175        }
176
177        for (NotificationMessage message : otherMessages) {
178            if (message.notificationIds().contains((int) getAamId())) {
179                return true;
180            }
181        }
182
183        return false;
184    }
185
186    public boolean matchesActiveMalfunction(
187        ActiveAamBitsResponse activeMalfunctionBits,
188        MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse
189    ) {
190        if (activeMalfunctionBits != null &&
191            activeMalfunctionBits.getAamType() == ActiveAamBitsResponse.AamType.MALFUNCTION)
192        {
193            return activeMalfunctionBits.hasActiveBit((int) getAamId());
194        }
195
196        if (malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse != null) {
197            return malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.hasMalfunctionBit((int) getAamId());
198        }
199
200        return true;
201    }
202
203
204    @Override
205    public int size() {
206        return (hasMalfunction() &&
207                !StringUtils.isBlank(getErrorString())) ? 1 : 0;
208    }
209
210    @Override
211    public int getId() {
212        return (int) getAamId();
213    }
214
215    @Override
216    public String getDescription() {
217        return getErrorString();
218    }
219}
